title: Visible Trails Ruins
description: Find so much easily Trail Ruins with this resource pack!
body:
Set the texture of the blocks that compose the visible part of trail ruins to make them much easier to find!

**Got an issue or a question? → Send me a message on Discord: enigmusse** By the way, I'm also on the Modrinth and CurseForge Discord servers.

**How to use it?** 1. Copy it into the resource packs folder of your Minecraft instance. 2. Open the escape menu, click **Resource Packs**, and select **"Visible Trails Ruins"**!

**Compatibility Notice** The resource pack functions correctly despite the compatibility warning. Simply confirm by selecting **Yes** when prompted. To suppress this notification completely, install the mod: - [No Resource Pack Warnings (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) Without this solution, I'd need to create and upload a separate archive for nearly every minor Minecraft version — even though the textures remain unchanged — leading to unnecessary extra work.
